# Andiamo in Banca

## About
Andiamo in Banca is an upscale Italian restaurant located in South San Francisco, California. The restaurant occupies a beautifully restored 1920s bank building at 101 South Linden Avenue. Owned by the Akkaya family, Andiamo has been serving handmade pasta, fresh seafood, and Italian classics since 2019.

## Key Information
- **Cuisine:** Upscale Italian
- **Location:** 101 S Linden Ave, South San Francisco, CA 94080
- **Phone:** (650) 745-8811
- **Website:** https://www.andiamoinbanca.com
- **Hours:** Tuesday–Thursday 11:30am–9pm, Friday 11:30am–10pm, Saturday 4pm–10pm, Sunday 4pm–9pm. Closed Monday.
- **Reservations:** Available via OpenTable

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.andiamoinbanca.com/)
- [Menu](https://www.andiamoinbanca.com/menu) — Lunch, dinner, pizza, wine & beer, happy hour
- [Our Story](https://www.andiamoinbanca.com/our-story) — The Akkaya family history from Cafe Figaro (1989) to Andiamo (2019)
- [The Vault](https://www.andiamoinbanca.com/the-vault) — Private dining in the original bank vault
- [Banquet & Catering](https://www.andiamoinbanca.com/banquet-catering) — Prix fixe banquet menus and catering packages
- [Gallery](https://www.andiamoinbanca.com/gallery) — Photos of the restaurant, food, and events
- [Contact](https://www.andiamoinbanca.com/contact) — Location, hours, and inquiry form

## Dining Options
- **Lunch:** Tuesday–Friday, starting at $10.95
- **Dinner:** Tuesday–Sunday, pastas from $22.95, entrees from $29.95
- **Happy Hour:** Tuesday–Friday 4–5pm
- **Private Dining:** The Vault seats up to 40 guests
- **Banquet Menus:** $35/person (lunch), $65, $80, $120/person (dinner)
- **Catering:** Available via ezCater for delivery

## History
The Akkaya family's restaurant legacy began with Cafe Figaro in 1989, followed by Don Giovanni in 1997. In 2019, Will Akkaya opened Andiamo in Banca, continuing the family tradition of Italian hospitality in a stunning historic bank building.
